title: BECIL – Senior Technical Assistant – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited (BECIL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Technical Assistant. Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through BECIL official website becil.com.

basic_details.job_title: BECIL Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited (BECIL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Technical Assistant. Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through BECIL official website becil.com.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Aquaculture or Zoology or Fisheries or Marine Biology

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.becil.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited Senior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026
